summary: Complete UI/UX rebuild testing of Capital Care AI with Cashly design system. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with new landing page, Cashly aesthetic (cream backgrounds, coral accents, white cards), and Individual persona only. Shop Owner and CA personas removed from frontend as expected.
passed_tests: Landing page loads at / with hero section, star badge (200k+ Members Joined), heading
Landing page navbar with Logo (Capital Care AI), Features, How it Works, Pricing, Testimonials, Login, Get Started Free
Landing page features section shows 4 feature cards (Spending Breakdown, Income & Expense Analytics, Cash Flow, Budget Planner)
Landing page 'Why Choose Us' section with 4 benefit tiles (Save Time, Smarter Decisions, Eliminate Spending, Reach Goals)
Landing page workflow steps (01, 02, 03) - Connect, Track, Analyse
Landing page testimonials section with 6 review cards with star ratings
Landing page bottom CTA section with dashboard mockup showing INR values
Landing page footer with Product/Company/Support links, social icons, copyright
Login page at /login with Cashly aesthetic (cream bg #F7F5F2, coral button #F4845F, white card)
Login with admin@capitalcare.ai / Admin@123 - SUCCESS
Dashboard loads with 4 KPI cards (Total Balance, Monthly Income, Monthly Expenses, Savings Growth)
Dashboard KPI cards show INR formatting with ₹ symbol (₹1.81 L, ₹2.00 L)
Dashboard shows Income vs Expenses line chart
Dashboard shows Spending Breakdown donut chart
Dashboard shows 3-Month Savings Forecast widget
Dashboard shows Smart Insights/Alerts panel
Dashboard has AI Chat button (Robot icon) that opens chat drawer
AI Chat drawer shows 'Capital Care AI - Your financial assistant' with GPT-5.2 responses
Dashboard has Export dropdown (CSV/PDF) - both working
Transactions page - SMS parser works (parsed Rs.2,500.00 from Swiggy SMS)
Transactions page - add income transaction (Salary ₹75,000)
Transactions page - add expense transaction (Dining ₹3,500)
Transactions page - Income/Expense toggle buttons work
Goals page - create goal with target and deadline
Goals page - what-if planner input present
Goals page - quick add savings buttons (+₹1,000, +₹5,000, +₹10,000)
Pricing page shows 3 tiers (Free ₹0, Pro ₹99, Premium ₹299)
Pricing page 'Most Popular' badge on Pro tier
Bottom navigation works on mobile (Home, Transactions, Goals, Reports, Profile)
INR formatting shows ₹ symbol with Indian number system (L for Lakhs)
Mobile responsive design working correctly

test_classes: TestAuth (3 tests) - login success, invalid credentials, /me endpoint
TestIndividualDashboard (2 tests) - dashboard loads, transactions CRUD
TestForecastAndAlerts (2 tests) - forecast individual, alerts individual
TestExport (2 tests) - CSV and PDF export
TestPricing (1 test) - pricing tiers with INR
TestAIChat (2 tests) - empty message rejection, chat history

critical_code_review_comments: Cashly design system properly implemented: cream backgrounds (#F7F5F2), coral accents (#F4845F), white cards with subtle shadows, pill buttons
Shop Owner and CA personas correctly removed from frontend - only Individual persona used
AuthContext auto-sets persona to 'individual' on login/register
Landing page complete with all sections: hero, features, why choose us, workflow, testimonials, bottom CTA, footer
INR formatting working correctly with ₹ symbol and Indian number system (L for Lakhs, Cr for Crores)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
AI Chat uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations.llm.chat
Plus Jakarta Sans font applied throughout
seed_data_creation: Backend creates admin user on startup with ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD from .env. Test transactions and goals created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Capital Care AI complete UI/UX rebuild with Cashly design system tested. Single Individual persona only (Shop Owner and CA removed from frontend). Landing page at /, login at /login, dashboard at /dashboard, transactions at /transactions, goals at /goals, pricing at /pricing. Design tokens: cream (#F7F5F2), coral (#F4845F), white cards, pill buttons, Plus Jakarta Sans font. All features preserved: KPI cards with sparklines, charts (line/donut), AI chat with GPT-5.2, smart alerts, 3-month forecast, export PDF/CSV, goals with what-if planner, SMS parser, INR formatting. All 15 backend tests pass. No issues found.

landing_page.hero: Star badge (200k+ Members Joined), large heading, two CTAs (Get Started Free coral, View Demo outline)
landing_page.features: 4 cards with emoji icons - Spending Breakdown, Income & Expense Analytics, Cash Flow, Budget Planner
landing_page.why_choose_us: 4 benefit tiles with Phosphor icons - Save Time, Smarter Decisions, Eliminate Spending, Reach Goals
landing_page.testimonials: 6 review cards with 5-star ratings, user avatars with initials, names and roles
landing_page.bottom_cta: Gradient card with dashboard mockup showing INR values
landing_page.footer: 4-column layout (Brand, Product, Company, Support), social icons, copyright

design_review.auth_page: Cream background, white card with shadow, coral Sign in button, toggle to Sign up
design_review.dashboard: 4 KPI cards in grid, line chart, donut chart, forecast widget, alerts panel, goals preview, bottom nav
design_review.transactions: SMS parser card, search input, transaction list with income (green) and expense (coral) indicators
design_review.goals: Goal cards with progress bars, quick add buttons, what-if planner
design_review.pricing: 3 tier cards (Free/Pro/Premium), Most Popular badge on Pro, coral CTA on Pro

cashly_design_tokens.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), coral primary, dark secondary, outline variant
cashly_design_tokens.cards: White background, 16px border-radius, subtle shadow (0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06))
